text: @Kuilean1 @_KithureKindiki Nyoka ni gachagua na wamunyoro retards ... Tutam
label: hate
rationale: 'wamunyoro retards' applies a derogatory collective slur to an ethnic community; 'nyoka' as a dehumanising epithet is then transferred onto a named ethnic group, not only a named individual.

text: Simba aRATi is surely mtoto wa Nyoka. Anapangia Linda Mwananchi goons in kisii. Chief goon aRATi ajue kisii ni lazima tufike!
label: offensive
rationale: 'mtoto wa Nyoka' and 'Chief goon' are personal abuse aimed at a named individual (aRATi); no contempt is transferred onto the Kisii community as a group.

text: @JimiWanjigi I used to believe you until the day I saw you with Kenya's number tribalist. I then knew that mtoto wa nyoka ni nyoka tu.
label: offensive
rationale: 'mtoto wa nyoka ni nyoka tu' is a personal proverb-insult aimed at a named individual (Wanjigi) and his association, with no ethnic group targeted.

text: We have no country here!!! Next year it will be the chief goon's 20th anniversary after he committed the charges below in /07. Do you think he has turned saint even if his patner in crime is a "prophetess/healer",nope leopards do not change their madoadoa, they still remain killers!! Occupy statehouse!!!
label: offensive
rationale: 'madoadoa' is repurposed here as a metaphor for a named individual's character flaws ('leopards do not change their madoadoa'), not as a removal-of-community marker; the attack stays on a specific politician and 'killers' is an individual accusation, though 'Occupy statehouse' adds a threatening political edge.

text: @georgediano Kalonzo will join Ruto,as early December or latest February 2027,nyoka sana huyu jamaa
label: offensive
rationale: 'nyoka sana huyu jamaa' is a personal insult directed at a named individual (Kalonzo), with no ethnic group targeted.

text: Deep down I know kasongo wants a "kwekwe shambani mwa nyayo na zilimwe" song dedicated to him. But anaku wa kumwandikia ndio ajiskie. Nyi wote ni vichwa ngumu
label: offensive
rationale: 'kwekwe shambani... zilimwe' is an NCIC-flagged phrase but here it is deployed sarcastically against a named individual (kasongo) rather than against an ethnic community, and framed as irony about what he secretly desires.

text: @__abdi_ Watu wa dawa ya mende na panya ni washenzi sana. .. but wajue ni tutam, wapende wasipende.. Ruto hata anaenda 14 years bila break,
label: offensive
rationale: 'Watu wa dawa ya mende na panya' insults a set of individuals (implied political actors) with crude language, but no identifiable ethnic community is targeted; 'washenzi' is generic abuse rather than ethnic contempt here.

text: @scherargei No sensible politician celebrates losing a single vote. Every votes counts. Fukuza mlima,fukuza sifuna
label: neither
rationale: 'Fukuza mlima' is ambiguous - could reference Mt Kenya political bloc - but in context this reads as electoral political rhetoric about vote-counting strategy rather than a call to expel an ethnic community; 'fukuza sifuna' names an individual, anchoring the statement in politician-level criticism.

text: @Georgeruto001 tunaua nyoka na mayai yake huku mlimani
label: hate
rationale: 'tunaua nyoka na mayai yake huku mlimani' - killing snakes and eggs applied to the Mt Kenya region is eliminationist dehumanisation with a geographic ethnic target, closely matching the flagged ex4 pattern.

text: Boy Kids should avoid this kind of Women's This is a serpent pretending to be a Woman Ukidinya yeye, maisha yako kwisha Shindwa Pepo ya Nyoka 🐍🐉 #Maandamano #sabasaba
label: offensive
rationale: 'serpent pretending to be a Woman' and 'Pepo ya Nyoka' are misogynistic personal insults directed at an individual woman, with no ethnic community targeted.

text: @JimNjue_254 Nyoro ni Nyoka.
label: hate
rationale: 'Nyoro ni Nyoka' collectively dehumanises an ethnic community by equating the entire group with snakes, satisfying NCIC ethnic contempt standard.

text: @kinyuamike @KenyanSays Sio wewe ndio utaniambia kitu ya kufanya or not to do...mende wewe. Vile niliona ati double dare nilijua tu mnadeal na fala but I tried accommodating your stupidity. Nyinyi ndio wale mkiskia tunapenda maandamano mnaanza kupreach vile sijui serikali itatufanya nini...ngui
label: offensive
rationale: 'mende wewe', 'fala', 'stupidity', 'ngui' are personal insults aimed at a specific individual in an argument, with no ethnic group targeted.

text: #HABARI Zaidi ya watu 900 wamekamatwa kufuatia maandamano ya kitaifa yaliyofanyika Jumanne nchini Afrika Kusini kupinga uwepo wa wahamiaji wasio na nyaraka halali...
label: neither
rationale: Factual news reporting on South African anti-immigration protests and police response, with no contemptuous framing by the author.

text: Ambieni Ruto aache mafeelings za OLKALOU 😂 boat ni kitu ya kutunyanganya?😂Ama wanangojea mp mwingine akufe😂 kwanza vyenye wameita cousin yetu SIFUNA maskini juu ni mtoto wa Mwalimu kanduyi,watajua hawajui, mlima loves the oppressed #RutoMustGo #SisiNdioSifuna #BaBuKwaSababu #RekeTumanwo #CuzoForCuzo 🇰🇪
label: hate
rationale: 'watajua hawajui' is an NCIC-flagged veiled threat; while the post is broadly pro-opposition political commentary, embedding this NCIC-flagged phrase as a warning to unspecified opponents tips it over the line.

text: @rigathi Ol kalao Tokelezea ushape roundi moja mweenda, uue hizo Nyoka na mayai Zake
label: hate
rationale: 'uue hizo Nyoka na mayai Zake' - an explicit kill-the-snakes-and-eggs call directed at a named Mt Kenya constituency is eliminationist violence incitement against an ethnic community.

text: @Kenyans During a by election in Mt Kenya wana pewa boats, wana wekewa stima, bara bara tarmac, a full complete Meko ile ya 6k wana uziwa 1500. Na on top 5,000 each ukipatana na wama egg akitembea. Huko Kasipul walikua wana pewa rungu na panga wafukuzane. Is that fair ?😂😂
label: neither
rationale: Factual comparative critique of electoral resource allocation between Mt Kenya and Kasipul constituencies, with no dehumanisation or ethnic contempt.

text: Man sounds warning to goons recounting how he was part of the 2008 outfit that was used by government for similar dirty work as today. He recounts how Michuki had Mungiki, Raila had Taliban and Nyachae had Chinkororo and the turf wars that followed after elections, then Kwekwe squad.........
label: neither
rationale: Historical reporting on political militia use and a warning about current parallels; the author is recounting and cautioning, not inciting.

text: 20th May, 2026 STATEMENT BY THE DCP DEPUTY PARTY LEADER SENATOR CLEOPHAS MALALA ON ETHNIC PROFILING IN KENYA BY UDA GOVERNMENT...
label: neither
rationale: A formal political statement condemning ethnic profiling and arguing that opposition to Ruto is economic not ethnic; the author explicitly rejects 41-vs-1 framing and defends both Kikuyu and Kalenjin communities against instrumentalisation.

text: @YusuphCabdi @HonAdenDuale Tukimaliza kutoa wantam, next ni kutoa madoadoa Kenya. Tuwe safi kama pamba
label: hate
rationale: 'kutoa madoadoa Kenya. Tuwe safi kama pamba' - removal of a community marked as spots to achieve ethnic purity; classic 2007-08 eliminationist framing using an NCIC-flagged term.

text: @EvanoMemba @HonKangata Sisi watu wa murang'a tuko sawa. Infact ame overwork sana. So we sent him to join the Linda wananchi team ndio tufukuze kasongo vizuri. You should mind what your governor is doing or has done and leave murang'a business alone.
label: neither
rationale: 'tufukuze kasongo' targets a named individual politician; the post is regional political defensiveness about a governor, not collective contempt for any ethnic community.

text: @_KithureKindiki Yangu Iko, but nyoka na mayai yake lazima iende
label: hate
rationale: 'nyoka na mayai yake lazima iende' - the snakes-and-eggs expulsion formula is eliminationist coded language; without explicit ethnic marker confidence is medium, but the expulsion call on dehumanising grounds meets the NCIC standard.

text: Tiba ya sumu ya nyoka: Kaunti ya Kirinyaga yaweka mikakati ya kuunda dawa Maeneo mengi ya Kirinyaga yana nyoka wengi mno #SemaNaCitizen
label: neither
rationale: Literal news headline about snakebite antivenom production in Kirinyaga County; glossary term used in its everyday biological sense.

text: @thekognitive @Abdikadirmba008 how and it is dcp strong hold? DCP ndo ikishindwa wafunge virago. nikama UDA inataka kuua nyoka kwa kupiga kichwa
label: neither
rationale: 'kuua nyoka kwa kupiga kichwa' is a proverb about decisiveness in political strategy; used metaphorically about a party (UDA) dealing with political opposition, not targeting an ethnic community.

text: Hii kenya ikipata opposition leader kama Ruto na rais kama sifuna ....hii kenya ita nyoka.. I support Ruto to be the best opposition leader...tuone wamunyoro anafanya kazi gani
label: hate
rationale: 'tuone wamunyoro anafanya kazi gani' singles out the Munyoro community for collective scrutiny/scepticism about their leader's competence, extending the implicit contempt from an individual to the ethnic group; 'hii kenya ita nyoka' reinforces a dehumanising community association.

text: @abbiezuena Hii ndio tunataka. Kaende Kaende ...Kifo Cha Mende hio siku itakua lit 🔥. Tackles za Sifuna na chocha kaongo. Ayam ready for debate 😎
label: offensive
rationale: 'Kifo Cha Mende' is crude hyperbolic slang celebrating an expected political defeat of named individuals (Sifuna, kasongo) in a debate context, not a dehumanising attack on an ethnic community; the festive framing ('lit', 'ready for debate') confirms political banter rather than incitement.
